prompt: I have a feature with both a required Diagnosis_Type column (vocabulary) and an optional confidence column (float4). Some images have confidence scores and some don't. How do I add values for both?

assertions.name: uses_add_feature_value_record
assertions.description: Should recommend add_feature_value_record (not add_feature_value) since there are multiple columns

assertions.name: shows_mixed_entries
assertions.description: Should show entries where some have confidence and some don't

assertions.name: explains_required_always_present
assertions.description: Should explain that required columns (Diagnosis_Type) must be in every entry

assertions.name: explains_optional_can_be_omitted
assertions.description: Should explain that optional columns (confidence) can be omitted from individual entries

assertions.name: suggests_inspecting_feature_first
assertions.description: Should suggest reading the feature resource or lookup_feature to confirm required/optional status
